name: Bunker Hill Mining Corp.
summary: Bunker Hill Mining Corp. is a Nevada-incorporated mining company focused on restarting the Bunker Hill Mine, a polymetallic mine located in Kellogg, Idaho, in the Silver Valley region. The company, through its wholly owned subsidiary Silver Valley Metals Corp., is developing the mine for production of base and precious metals. It trades on the TSX Venture Exchange and OTCQB Venture Market.
